title: Denise's Fudge
description: An old-fashioned stovetop chocolate fudge with marshmallows and chopped nuts — cooked, poured, cooled, and cut into squares.
instructions: Add the sugar, milk, butter, and salt together in a saucepan. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the chocolate chips while stirring and cook until melted. Remove from heat, add marshmallows, vanilla, and nuts, and stir well.
Pour into an 8-inch pan, leave it to cool, and cut into squares. Serve!
